architecture.summary: Existing CF Workers + Prisma DB + KV search shards architecture. publishSkill upserts to DB, enrichment cron batch-updates metrics, search-index-consumer handles incremental KV shard updates via queue messages.

integrations.summary: GitHub REST API for star/fork counts (5s timeout, bearer token auth). npm registry for downloads. All fetches are best-effort with fallback to 0.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - backend-only changes. Search results on verified-skill.com will display correct star counts as a result of backend fixes.

performance.summary: Enrichment cron already has rate-limit backoff. Star fetch at publish adds max 5s latency (best-effort, non-blocking). Incremental shard updates avoid full index rebuild. Admin endpoints are for manual/infrequent use.

security.summary: Admin endpoints use existing requireAdmin + hasInternalAuth pattern (X-Internal-Key or SUPER_ADMIN JWT). No new auth requirements.

edge-cases.summary: Dedup keeps highest trustScore (tiebreaker: newest certifiedAt). Install counts on deprecated dupes discarded. refresh-skills requires at least one filter (no refresh-all footgun). Shard dispatch only when metrics actually changed. legacySlug already handled by publishSkill.
